---
title: "Home"
_quarto:
  render-project: true
  tests:
    html:
      ensureHtmlElements:
        - ['script#quarto-search-options']
        - []
      ensureFileRegexMatches:
        - ['"engine": "pagefind"']
        - []
      fileExists:
        outputPath: "pagefind/pagefind.js"
---

Welcome to the Pagefind test site. This page tests basic search indexing.
